data.title: Momcozy Official Washing Block for Momcozy KleanPal Pro Baby Bottle Washer, 120 Detergent Tablets

features: we recommend Momcozy Official Washing Tablets. Formulas from others may differ in foaming and rinsing behavior.
Strong Cleaning Power: These are specially designed to remove stubborn milk residue and odor.
Compatible: Designed to work seamlessly with the Momcozy KleanPal Pro baby bottle washer.
Safe: Rest assured that these washing block tablets are baby-safe
providing you with peace of mind when it comes to your baby's health and safety.
Momcozy Washing Block: Pairing with a Momcozy KleanPal Pro baby bottle washer can safe and powerful cleaning for their baby's bottles
Note：The date on the packaging is the manufacturing date
and the shelf life is 2 years.
